calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Aug-30-2006 Continued To Sep-28-06 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 525

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Sep-28-2006 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: 9:30am
Judge Pro Tem Sharon L. O'Grady, clerk-Beth Wilber, nothing on record:
Cause called for Small Claims appeal. Respondent Jeffrey Tamba Silao appears in Pro Per; appellant, Alan Chui Chan, appears through counsel Ariella Evelyn Perry. Also appearing: Amanda Chen as interpreter for Mr. Chan to translate Cantonese into English, and English into Cantonese. Parties previously sworn testify in the narrative. Judge O'Grady has questions for the parties.
EXHA Diagram of accident site ID/EV
10:07am
PATRICK WILSON S/E
Mr. Wilson, previously sworn, testifies in the narrative.
10:11am
Matter is submitted, SCA evidence is returned to the appellant's attorney.

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Aug-16-2006 Continued To Sep-28-06 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 525
MINI MINUTES: Judge Pro Tem Elliot Myles, clerk-Beth Wilber, nothing on record:
Cause called for Small Claims Appeal.
8-16-06, 10:10am
Cause called for Small Claims Appeal. Respondent, Jeffrey Tamba Silao, appears in Pro Per; Appellant, Alan Chui Chan, appears with Ariell Perry, Esq. Ms. Perry makes an oral motion in open court to continue the hearing to allow Mr. Chan to get a Cantonese interpreter. Judge Myles grants the motion for good cause. The matter is continued to Sept. 7, 2006. Ms. Perry is to take the necessary steps to continue the matter if Sept. 7, 2006 is not convenient.
10:15am
Court adjourns
